nasb.text: And He was in the wilderness forty days being tempted by Satan; and He was with the wild beasts, and the angels were ministering to Him.

esv.text: And he was in the wilderness forty days, being tempted by Satan. And he was with the wild animals, and the angels were ministering to him.

cnv.text: 他在那裡四十天，受撒但的試探，和野獸在一起，有天使來服事他。

ccb.text: 祂在旷野受撒旦的试探四十天。祂与野兽在一起，有天使服侍祂。

csbs.text: 他在旷野里四十天，受撒旦的试探。他与野兽在一起，并有天使们伺候他。
